name: dev_pipeline
description: Dev-agent robustness pipeline: validate + atomic save + snapshot + rollback. Any writer (dev_new, dev_edit, neuro_crafter, or an AI tool-call) should funnel writes through this for safety.

inputs.name: neuro_name
inputs.description: target neuro folder name (renamed from 'name' to avoid kwarg clash w/ factory.run)

inputs.name: conf
inputs.description: conf.json as dict or JSON string

summary_md: Safe-write layer for neuro authoring. 4 ops: validate / save / rollback / list_snapshots. Snapshots rotate (keep 10). Emits structured error envelopes on failure.
